content.content:
### Stakeholder Overview

Adds two new components to `@customink/pigment-extensions/reco` for the Recently Viewed feature: a compact **MiniProductCard** and a **RecentlyViewedCarousel** widget. These are prerequisites for the RV placements across Homepage, PDP, and Catalog (RECO-780, RECO-782, RECO-789, RECO-791).

### Affected areas

- 🧩 `packages/extensions` - reco team components
- 📖 `apps/storybook`

### Risk Estimate _[(learn more)](https://app.getguru.com/card/iMnRRRjT/Pull-Request-Risk-Estimate)_

- ✅ Negligible risk!

### Changes

- **MiniProductCard** — compact product card (image + 3-line truncated name) using Pigment `Typography` and design tokens. Fully accessible, link-wrapped, with hover state and `data-testid` attributes.
- **RecentlyViewedCarousel** — keen-slider carousel with two variants (`large` h2 heading for homepage, `compact` h4 heading for PDP). Optional header arrows (hidden by default) with infinite loop when enabled. Responsive slides config targeting ~188px card width.
- **Shared `useBreakpoint` hook** — extracted from `ProductsCarousel/utils.ts` to `hooks/useBreakpoint/` for reuse across both trending and recently viewed widgets.
- **Carousel `sliderRef` prop** — new imperative handle on the Carousel atom for external prev/next control (used by header arrows). Non-breaking addition.
- **Storybook stories** for both components with multiple variants.
- **21 unit tests** across both components (11 MiniProductCard + 10 RecentlyViewedCarousel).

### Project Link

RECO-810 → https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-810

### Screenshots



### Testing Instructions

> :warning: Human should remove any that do not apply

- ✅ ⛮  CI pipelines passing
- ✅ 📖 Storybook manually verified
- ✅ 🕵 All AI-generated code manually reviewed by a human
[result-id: r3]
[rerun: b7]

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Here's the summary:

## PR #1139 Summary

### What the PR Does

Adds two new React components to the `@customink/pigment-extensions/reco` package for Recently Viewed product placement across the site (Homepage, PDP, and Catalog):

1. **MiniProductCard** — A compact product card component displaying an image and 3-line truncated product name
2. **RecentlyViewedCarousel** — A carousel widget with two layout variants (large h2 for homepage, compact h4 for PDP) that displays recently viewed products

These components are prerequisites for implementing Recently Viewed features (RECO-780, RECO-782, RECO-789, RECO-791).

### Files Changed

**New Components & Files:**
- `packages/extensions/reco/Molecules/MiniProductCard/` — Complete new component with TypeScript, CSS module, and tests
- `packages/extensions/reco/RecentlyViewedWidget/RecentlyViewedCarousel.tsx` — Main carousel component with module CSS and tests
- `packages/extensions/reco/hooks/useBreakpoint/` — New shared breakpoint detection hook
- `packages/extensions/reco/Atoms/Carousel/constants.ts` — Extracted arrow path SVG constant
- `apps/storybook/stories/extensions/reco/` — Storybook stories for both components

**Modified Files:**
- `packages/extensions/reco/Atoms/Carousel/Carousel.tsx` — Added `sliderRef` prop for imperative carousel control via new `CarouselHandle` type
- `packages/extensions/reco/Molecules/ProductsCarousel/utils.ts` — Removed `useBreakpoint` hook (migrated to shared hook folder)
- `packages/extensions/reco/index.ts` — Exported new components in public API

### Notable Implementation Details

- **Accessibility first**: Components include proper ARIA labels, focus states, keyboard navigation support, and `data-testid` attributes
- **Responsive design**: Card width optimized for ~188px with configurable slides per view across breakpoints (mobile: 2.3, tablet: 3.4, desktop: 6)
- **Imperatively controlled carousel**: New `sliderRef` pattern allows header arrow buttons to programmatically control carousel navigation
- **Extracted reusable hook**: `useBreakpoint` moved to shared hook folder for reuse across trending and recently viewed widgets
- **21 unit tests**: Full test coverage (11 for MiniProductCard, 10 for RecentlyViewedCarousel)
- **Two component variants**: Large variant uses h2 heading (homepage), compact variant uses h4 heading (PDP placement)
